purpose: Default rotating theme schedule for THC Daily Crossword generation.

weeklyRotation.label: Grow Room Basics
weeklyRotation.notes: Beginner-friendly cultivation, tools, airflow, light, and environment terms.

weeklyRotation.label: DTF Genetics
weeklyRotation.notes: Brand, breeding projects, house crosses, and cultivar lineage language.

weeklyRotation.label: Plant Science
weeklyRotation.notes: Terpenes, plant anatomy, biology, and grower science terms.

weeklyRotation.label: Harvest and Extracts
weeklyRotation.notes: Harvest, drying, curing, resin, hash, rosin, and post-harvest language.

weeklyRotation.label: Flavor Friday
weeklyRotation.notes: DTF flavor notes, fruit terms, strain-family language, and cultivar clues.

weeklyRotation.label: Weekend Grow Check
weeklyRotation.notes: Fast mini crossword for growers checking plants on the weekend.

weeklyRotation.label: Sunday Mixed Mini
weeklyRotation.notes: Mixed educational puzzle that can pull from science, cultivation, and breeding terms.
